blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,289 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
